tZh: 动态路由在胶囊网络中的应用
sEn: A capsule network with dynamic routing achieves state-of-the-art on MNIST and excels at recognizing overlapping digits.
sZh: 一种采用动态路由机制的胶囊网络在MNIST上达到最优性能，并在识别高度重叠数字方面显著优于卷积网络。
absEn: A capsule is a group of neurons whose activity vector represents the instantiation parameters of a specific type of entity such as an object or an object part. We use the length of the activity vector to represent the probability that the entity exists and its orientation to represent the instantiation parameters. Active capsules at one level make predictions, via transformation matrices, for the instantiation parameters of higher-level capsules. When multiple predictions agree, a higher level capsule becomes active. We show that a discrimininatively trained, multi-layer capsule system achieves state-of-the-art performance on MNIST and is considerably better than a convolutional net at recognizing highly overlapping digits. To achieve these results we use an iterative routing-by-agreement mechanism: A lower-level capsule prefers to send its output to higher level capsules whose activity vectors have a big scalar product with the prediction coming from the lower-level capsule.
absZh: 胶囊是一组神经元，其活动向量表示特定类型实体（如物体或物体部分）的实例化参数。我们使用活动向量的长度表示实体存在的概率，其方向表示实例化参数。低层胶囊通过变换矩阵对高层胶囊的实例化参数进行预测。当多个预测一致时，高层胶囊被激活。我们证明，一个经过判别训练的多层胶囊系统在MNIST上达到了最先进的性能，并且在识别高度重叠的数字方面明显优于卷积网络。为了实现这些结果，我们使用了一种迭代的路由协议机制：低层胶囊倾向于将其输出发送给那些活动向量与低层胶囊预测的标量积较大的高层胶囊。

contrib.en: Introduces CapsNet with dynamic routing-by-agreement, achieving state-of-the-art 0.25% test error on MNIST.
contrib.zh: 提出带有动态路由协议的 CapsNet，在 MNIST 上达到 0.25% 的测试错误率，为当时最优。

contrib.en: Capsules use vector outputs to represent instantiation parameters, with vector length indicating entity existence.
contrib.zh: 胶囊使用向量输出表示实例化参数，向量长度表示实体存在概率。

contrib.en: Dynamic routing enables superior segmentation of highly overlapping digits, outperforming CNNs on MultiMNIST.
contrib.zh: 动态路由实现了对高度重叠数字的优越分割，在 MultiMNIST 上优于 CNN。

contrib.en: CapsNet generalizes better to affine transformations than CNNs, achieving 79% vs 66% on affNIST.
contrib.zh: CapsNet 对仿射变换的泛化能力优于 CNN，在 affNIST 上达到 79% 对比 66%。

contrib.en: The model uses a reconstruction regularizer to enforce pose encoding, improving routing performance.
contrib.zh: 模型使用重构正则化强制姿态编码，提升了路由性能。

contrib.en: Capsules provide viewpoint-invariant knowledge via transformation matrices, avoiding exponential inefficiencies of CNNs.
contrib.zh: 胶囊通过变换矩阵提供视角不变知识，避免了 CNN 的指数级低效问题。

limits.en: Assumes at most one instance of a capsule's entity per location, limiting handling of multiple same-class objects.
limits.zh: 假设每个位置最多存在一个胶囊实体，限制了处理同类别多个对象的能力。

limits.en: Performance on CIFAR-10 (10.6% error) is modest, as capsules struggle with complex backgrounds.
limits.zh: 在 CIFAR-10 上性能一般（10.6% 错误率），因为胶囊难以处理复杂背景。

limits.en: Routing-by-agreement requires iterative computation, increasing inference cost compared to max-pooling.
limits.zh: 动态路由需要迭代计算，相比最大池化增加了推理成本。

limits.en: The model is shallow (3 layers) and may not scale well to deeper architectures or larger datasets.
limits.zh: 模型较浅（3 层），可能难以扩展到更深架构或更大数据集。

limits.en: Capsule networks are still in early research stage, requiring more insights to outperform mature technologies like CNNs.
limits.zh: 胶囊网络仍处于早期研究阶段，需要更多洞察才能超越 CNN 等成熟技术。

items.en: A capsule is a group of neurons whose activity vector represents the instantiation parameters of a specific type of entity such as an object or an object part. We use the length of the activity vector to represent the probability that the entity exists and its orientation to represent the instantiation parameters. Active capsules at one level make predictions, via transformation matrices, for the instantiation parameters of higher-level capsules. When multiple predictions agree, a higher level capsule becomes active. We show that a discrimininatively trained, multi-layer capsule system achieves state-of-the-art performance on MNIST and is considerably better than a convolutional net at recognizing highly overlapping digits. To achieve these results we use an iterative routing-by-agreement mechanism: A lower-level capsule prefers to send its output to higher level capsules whose activity vectors have a big scalar product with the prediction coming from the lower-level capsule.
items.zh: 胶囊是一组神经元，其活动向量表示特定类型实体（如物体或物体部件）的实例化参数。我们使用活动向量的长度来表示实体存在的概率，其方向表示实例化参数。某一层的活跃胶囊通过变换矩阵，为更高层胶囊的实例化参数做出预测。当多个预测一致时，更高层的胶囊变得活跃。我们证明，一个经过判别训练的多层胶囊系统在MNIST上达到了最先进的性能，并且在识别高度重叠的数字方面明显优于卷积网络。为了实现这些结果，我们使用了一种迭代的按协议路由机制：低层胶囊倾向于将其输出发送给那些活动向量与来自低层胶囊的预测具有较大标量积的高层胶囊。

items.en: Human vision ignores irrelevant details by using a carefully determined sequence of fixation points to ensure that only a tiny fraction of the optic array is ever processed at the highest resolution. Introspection is a poor guide to understanding how much of our knowledge of a scene comes from the sequence of fixations and how much we glean from a single fixation, but in this paper we will assume that a single fixation gives us much more than just a single identified object and its properties. We assume that our multi-layer visual system creates a parse tree-like structure on each fixation, and we ignore the issue of how these single-fixation parse trees are coordinated over multiple fixations.
items.zh: 人类视觉通过精心确定的注视点序列来忽略无关细节，确保只有极小部分的光学阵列以最高分辨率被处理。内省很难让我们理解场景知识有多少来自注视点序列，又有多少来自单次注视，但在本文中，我们假设单次注视提供的信息远不止单个识别对象及其属性。我们假设多层视觉系统在每次注视时都会创建一个类似解析树的结构，并忽略这些单次注视解析树如何在多次注视间协调的问题。

items.en: Parse trees are generally constructed on the fly by dynamically allocating memory. Following Hinton et al. (2000), however, we shall assume that, for a single fixation, a parse tree is carved out of a fixed multilayer neural network like a sculpture is carved from a rock. Each layer will be divided into many small groups of neurons called “capsules” (Hinton et al. (2011)) and each node in the parse tree will correspond to an active capsule. Using an iterative routing process, each active capsule will choose a capsule in the layer above to be its parent in the tree. For the higher levels of a visual system, this iterative process will be solving the problem of assigning parts to wholes.
items.zh: 解析树通常通过动态分配内存即时构建。然而，遵循 Hinton 等人 (2000) 的思路，我们假设对于单次注视，解析树是从固定的多层神经网络中雕刻出来的，就像雕塑从岩石中雕刻出来一样。每一层将被划分为许多称为“胶囊”的小型神经元组 (Hinton 等人 (2011))，解析树中的每个节点对应一个活跃的胶囊。通过迭代路由过程，每个活跃胶囊将选择上一层中的一个胶囊作为其在树中的父节点。对于视觉系统的更高层，这一迭代过程将解决将部分分配给整体的问题。

items.en: The activities of the neurons within an active capsule represent the various properties of a particular entity that is present in the image. These properties can include many different types of instantiation parameter such as pose (position, size, orientation), deformation, velocity, albedo, hue, texture, etc. One very special property is the existence of the instantiated entity in the image. An obvious way to represent existence is by using a separate logistic unit whose output is the probability that the entity exists. In this paper we explore an interesting alternative which is to use the overall length of the vector of instantiation parameters to represent the existence of the entity and to force the orientation of the vector to represent the properties of the entity111This makes biological sense as it does not use large activities to get accurate representations of things that probably don’t exist.. We ensure that the length of the vector output of a capsule cannot exceed 111 by applying a non-linearity that leaves the orientation of the vector unchanged but scales down its magnitude.
items.zh: 活跃胶囊内神经元的活动表示图像中存在的特定实体的各种属性。这些属性可以包括许多不同类型的实例化参数，例如姿态（位置、大小、方向）、形变、速度、反照率、色调、纹理等。一个非常特殊的属性是实例化实体在图像中的存在性。表示存在性的一种明显方式是使用一个独立的逻辑单元，其输出是实体存在的概率。在本文中，我们探索了一种有趣的替代方案：使用实例化参数向量的整体长度来表示实体的存在性，并强制向量的方向表示实体的属性。这具有生物学意义，因为它不会使用大的活动值来精确表示可能不存在的实体。我们通过应用一个非线性函数来确保胶囊输出向量的长度不超过 1，该函数保持向量的方向不变但缩放其幅度。

items.en: The fact that the output of a capsule is a vector makes it possible to use a powerful dynamic routing mechanism to ensure that the output of the capsule gets sent to an appropriate parent in the layer above. Initially, the output is routed to all possible parents but is scaled down by coupling coefficients that sum to 111. For each possible parent, the capsule computes a “prediction vector” by multiplying its own output by a weight matrix. If this prediction vector has a large scalar product with the output of a possible parent, there is top-down feedback which increases the coupling coefficient for that parent and decreasing it for other parents. This increases the contribution that the capsule makes to that parent thus further increasing the scalar product of the capsule’s prediction with the parent’s output. This type of “routing-by-agreement” should be far more effective than the very primitive form of routing implemented by max-pooling, which allows neurons in one layer to ignore all but the most active feature detector in a local pool in the layer below. We demonstrate that our dynamic routing mechanism is an effective way to implement the “explaining away” that is needed for segmenting highly overlapping objects.
items.zh: 胶囊输出是向量这一事实使得可以使用强大的动态路由机制来确保胶囊的输出被发送到上一层中合适的父节点。最初，输出被路由到所有可能的父节点，但通过总和为 1 的耦合系数进行缩放。对于每个可能的父节点，胶囊通过将其自身输出乘以权重矩阵来计算“预测向量”。如果该预测向量与某个可能父节点的输出具有较大的标量积，则存在自上而下的反馈，增加该父节点的耦合系数并减少其他父节点的耦合系数。这增加了胶囊对该父节点的贡献，从而进一步增加了胶囊预测与父节点输出的标量积。这种“通过一致性路由”应该比最大池化实现的非常原始的路由形式有效得多，最大池化允许一层中的神经元忽略下一层局部池中除最活跃特征检测器之外的所有特征。我们证明，我们的动态路由机制是实现“解释消除”的有效方法，这对于分割高度重叠的对象是必需的。

items.en: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) use translated replicas of learned feature detectors. This allows them to translate knowledge about good weight values acquired at one position in an image to other positions. This has proven extremely helpful in image interpretation. Even though we are replacing the scalar-output feature detectors of CNNs with vector-output capsules and max-pooling with routing-by-agreement, we would still like to replicate learned knowledge across space. To achieve this, we make all but the last layer of capsules be convolutional. As with CNNs, we make higher-level capsules cover larger regions of the image. Unlike max-pooling however, we do not throw away information about the precise position of the entity within the region. For low level capsules, location information is “place-coded” by which capsule is active. As we ascend the hierarchy, more and more of the positional information is “rate-coded” in the real-valued components of the output vector of a capsule. This shift from place-coding to rate-coding combined with the fact that higher-level capsules represent more complex entities with more degrees of freedom suggests that the dimensionality of capsules should increase as we ascend the hierarchy.
items.zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 使用学习到的特征检测器的平移副本。这使得它们能够将在图像一个位置获得的关于良好权重值的知识迁移到其他位置。这在图像解释中被证明非常有用。尽管我们用向量输出胶囊替换了 CNN 的标量输出特征检测器，并用通过一致性路由替换了最大池化，但我们仍然希望将学习到的知识在空间上复制。为了实现这一点，我们使除最后一层外的所有胶囊层都是卷积的。与 CNN 一样，我们使更高级别的胶囊覆盖图像的更大区域。然而，与最大池化不同，我们不会丢弃关于区域内实体精确位置的信息。对于低级胶囊，位置信息通过哪个胶囊活跃来进行“位置编码”。随着我们向层次结构上升，越来越多的位置信息通过胶囊输出向量的实值分量进行“速率编码”。这种从位置编码到速率编码的转变，加上更高级别的胶囊表示具有更多自由度的更复杂实体，表明胶囊的维度应随着层次结构的上升而增加。

full.sec: 2 How the vector inputs and outputs of a capsule are computed
full.secZh: 2 胶囊的向量输入和输出如何计算

items.en: There are many possible ways to implement the general idea of capsules. The aim of this paper is not to explore this whole space but simply to show that one fairly straightforward implementation works well and that dynamic routing helps.
items.zh: 实现胶囊通用思想的方法有很多种。本文的目的并非探索整个空间，而只是展示一种相当直接的实现方式效果良好，并且动态路由是有帮助的。

items.en: We want the length of the output vector of a capsule to represent the probability that the entity represented by the capsule is present in the current input. We therefore use a non-linear "squashing" function to ensure that short vectors get shrunk to almost zero length and long vectors get shrunk to a length slightly below 111. We leave it to discriminative learning to make good use of this non-linearity.
items.zh: 我们希望胶囊输出向量的长度表示当前输入中该胶囊所代表实体存在的概率。因此，我们使用一种非线性“压缩”函数，确保短向量被压缩到几乎为零的长度，而长向量被压缩到略低于1的长度。我们让判别学习来充分利用这种非线性。

items.en: where 𝐯jsubscript𝐯𝑗{\bf v}_{j} is the vector output of capsule j𝑗j and 𝐬jsubscript𝐬𝑗{\mathbf{s}}_{j} is its total input.
items.zh: 其中 v_j 是胶囊 j 的向量输出，s_j 是其总输入。

items.en: For all but the first layer of capsules, the total input to a capsule 𝐬jsubscript𝐬𝑗{\bf s}_{j} is a weighted sum over all “prediction vectors” 𝐮^j|isubscript^𝐮conditional𝑗𝑖{\bf\hat{u}}_{j|i} from the capsules in the layer below and is produced by multiplying the output 𝐮isubscript𝐮𝑖{\bf u}_{i} of a capsule in the layer below by a weight matrix 𝐖i​jsubscript𝐖𝑖𝑗{\bf W}_{ij}
items.zh: 对于除第一层之外的所有胶囊层，胶囊 s_j 的总输入是来自下一层所有胶囊的“预测向量” u_hat_{j|i} 的加权和，通过将下一层胶囊的输出 u_i 乘以权重矩阵 W_{ij} 得到。

items.en: where the ci​jsubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗c_{ij} are coupling coefficients that are determined by the iterative dynamic routing process.
items.zh: 其中 c_{ij} 是由迭代动态路由过程确定的耦合系数。

items.en: The coupling coefficients between capsule i𝑖i and all the capsules in the layer above sum to 111 and are determined by a “routing softmax” whose initial logits bi​jsubscript𝑏𝑖𝑗b_{ij} are the log prior probabilities that capsule i𝑖i should be coupled to capsule j𝑗j.
items.zh: 胶囊 i 与上一层所有胶囊之间的耦合系数之和为1，并由“路由softmax”确定，其初始对数 b_{ij} 是胶囊 i 应与胶囊 j 耦合的对数先验概率。

items.en: The log priors can be learned discriminatively at the same time as all the other weights. They depend on the location and type of the two capsules but not on the current input image222For MNIST we found that it was sufficient to set all of these priors to be equal.. The initial coupling coefficients are then iteratively refined by measuring the agreement between the current output 𝐯jsubscript𝐯𝑗{\bf v}_{j} of each capsule, j𝑗j, in the layer above and the prediction 𝐮^j|isubscript^𝐮conditional𝑗𝑖{\bf\hat{u}}_{j|i} made by capsule i𝑖i.
items.zh: 这些对数先验可以与其他所有权重同时通过判别学习得到。它们取决于两个胶囊的位置和类型，但不依赖于当前输入图像（对于MNIST，我们发现将所有先验设置为相等就足够了）。然后，通过测量上一层中每个胶囊 j 的当前输出 v_j 与胶囊 i 所做的预测 u_hat_{j|i} 之间的一致性，迭代地细化初始耦合系数。

items.en: The agreement is simply the scalar product ai​j=𝐯j.𝐮^j|iformulae-sequencesubscript𝑎𝑖𝑗subscript𝐯𝑗subscript^𝐮conditional𝑗𝑖a_{ij}={\bf v}_{j}.{\bf\hat{u}}_{j|i}. This agreement is treated as if it was a log likelihood and is added to the initial logit, bi​jsubscript𝑏𝑖𝑗b_{ij} before computing the new values for all the coupling coefficients linking capsule i𝑖i to higher level capsules.
items.zh: 一致性就是标量积 a_{ij} = v_j · u_hat_{j|i}。这个一致性被视为对数似然，并在计算连接胶囊 i 到更高层胶囊的所有耦合系数的新值之前，将其加到初始对数 b_{ij} 上。

items.en: In convolutional capsule layers, each capsule outputs a local grid of vectors to each type of capsule in the layer above using different transformation matrices for each member of the grid as well as for each type of capsule.
items.zh: 在卷积胶囊层中，每个胶囊使用不同的变换矩阵（针对网格中的每个成员以及每种类型的胶囊）向上一层每种类型的胶囊输出一个局部向量网格。

full.secZh: 3 数字存在性的边际损失

items.en: We are using the length of the instantiation vector to represent the probability that a capsule’s entity exists. We would like the top-level capsule for digit class k𝑘k to have a long instantiation vector if and only if that digit is present in the image. To allow for multiple digits, we use a separate margin loss, Lksubscript𝐿𝑘L_{k} for each digit capsule, k𝑘k:
items.zh: 我们使用实例化向量的长度来表示胶囊实体存在的概率。我们希望数字类别 k 的顶层胶囊只有在图像中存在该数字时才具有长的实例化向量。为了允许多个数字，我们为每个数字胶囊 k 使用一个单独的边际损失 Lk：

items.en: where Tk=1subscript𝑇𝑘1T_{k}=1 iff a digit of class k𝑘k is present333We do not allow an image to contain two instances of the same digit class. We address this weakness of capsules in the discussion section. and m+=0.9superscript𝑚0.9m^{+}=0.9 and m−=0.1superscript𝑚0.1m^{-}=0.1. The λ𝜆\lambda down-weighting of the loss for absent digit classes stops the initial learning from shrinking the lengths of the activity vectors of all the digit capsules. We use λ=0.5𝜆0.5\lambda=0.5. The total loss is simply the sum of the losses of all digit capsules.
items.zh: 其中 Tk=1 当且仅当存在类别 k 的数字（我们不允许图像中包含同一数字类别的两个实例。我们在讨论部分中解决了胶囊的这个弱点），m+=0.9 且 m−=0.1。对缺失数字类别的损失进行 λ 降权，可以防止初始学习阶段收缩所有数字胶囊活动向量的长度。我们使用 λ=0.5。总损失是所有数字胶囊损失的总和。

items.capEn: Figure 1: A simple CapsNet with 3 layers. This model gives comparable results to deep convolutional networks (such as Chang and Chen (2015)). The length of the activity vector of each capsule in DigitCaps layer indicates presence of an instance of each class and is used to calculate the classification loss. 𝐖i​jsubscript𝐖𝑖𝑗{\bf W}_{ij} is a weight matrix between each 𝐮i,i∈(1,32×6×6)subscript𝐮𝑖𝑖13266{\bf u}_{i},i\in(1,32\times 6\times 6) in PrimaryCapsules and 𝐯j,j∈(1,10)subscript𝐯𝑗𝑗110{\bf v}_{j},j\in(1,10).
items.capZh: 图1：一个具有3层的简单CapsNet。该模型取得了与深度卷积网络（如Chang和Chen (2015)）相当的结果。DigitCaps层中每个胶囊的活动向量长度表示每个类别的实例是否存在，并用于计算分类损失。𝐖𝑖𝑗是PrimaryCapsules中每个𝐮𝑖（𝑖∈(1,32×6×6)）与𝐯𝑗（𝑗∈(1,10)）之间的权重矩阵。

items.en: A simple CapsNet architecture is shown in Fig. 1. The architecture is shallow with only two convolutional layers and one fully connected layer. Conv111 has 256256256, 9×9999\times 9 convolution kernels with a stride of 1 and ReLU activation. This layer converts pixel intensities to the activities of local feature detectors that are then used as inputs to the primary capsules.
items.zh: 一个简单的 CapsNet 架构如图 1 所示。该架构较浅，仅包含两个卷积层和一个全连接层。Conv111 有 256 个 9×9 卷积核，步长为 1，并使用 ReLU 激活函数。该层将像素强度转换为局部特征检测器的活动，这些活动随后作为主胶囊的输入。

items.en: The primary capsules are the lowest level of multi-dimensional entities and, from an inverse graphics perspective, activating the primary capsules corresponds to inverting the rendering process. This is a very different type of computation than piecing instantiated parts together to make familiar wholes, which is what capsules are designed to be good at.
items.zh: 主胶囊是多维实体的最低层级，从逆向图形学的角度来看，激活主胶囊对应于逆转渲染过程。这与将实例化部件拼凑成熟悉整体（这正是胶囊设计所擅长的）是一种截然不同的计算类型。

items.en: The second layer (PrimaryCapsules) is a convolutional capsule layer with 323232 channels of convolutional 888D capsules (i.e. each primary capsule contains 8 convolutional units with a 9×9999\times 9 kernel and a stride of 2). Each primary capsule output sees the outputs of all 256×8125681256\times 81 Conv111 units whose receptive fields overlap with the location of the center of the capsule. In total PrimaryCapsules has [32×6×6]delimited-[]3266[32\times 6\times 6] capsule outputs (each output is an 888D vector) and each capsule in the [6×6]delimited-[]66[6\times 6] grid is sharing their weights with each other. One can see PrimaryCapsules as a Convolution layer with Eq. 1 as its block non-linearity. The final Layer (DigitCaps) has one 161616D capsule per digit class and each of these capsules receives input from all the capsules in the layer below.
items.zh: 第二层（PrimaryCapsules）是一个卷积胶囊层，包含 32 个通道的 8D 卷积胶囊（即每个主胶囊包含 8 个卷积单元，核大小为 9×9，步长为 2）。每个主胶囊输出会看到所有 256×81 个 Conv111 单元的输出，这些单元的感受野与胶囊中心位置重叠。PrimaryCapsules 总共有 [32×6×6] 个胶囊输出（每个输出是一个 8D 向量），并且 [6×6] 网格中的每个胶囊共享权重。可以将 PrimaryCapsules 视为一个卷积层，其块非线性为公式 1。最后一层（DigitCaps）每个数字类别有一个 16D 胶囊，每个胶囊接收来自下一层所有胶囊的输入。

items.en: We have routing only between two consecutive capsule layers (e.g. PrimaryCapsules and DigitCaps). Since Conv111 output is 111D, there is no orientation in its space to agree on. Therefore, no routing is used between Conv111 and PrimaryCapsules. All the routing logits (bi​jsubscript𝑏𝑖𝑗b_{ij}) are initialized to zero. Therefore, initially a capsule output (𝐮isubscript𝐮𝑖{\bf u}_{i}) is sent to all parent capsules (𝐯0​…​𝐯9subscript𝐯0…subscript𝐯9{\bf v}_{0}...{\bf v}_{9}) with equal probability (ci​jsubscript𝑐𝑖𝑗c_{ij}). Our implementation is in TensorFlow (Abadi et al. (2016)) and we use the Adam optimizer (Kingma and Ba (2014)) with its TensorFlow default parameters, including the exponentially decaying learning rate, to minimize the sum of the margin losses in Eq. 4.
items.zh: 我们仅在两个连续的胶囊层之间进行路由（例如 PrimaryCapsules 和 DigitCaps）。由于 Conv111 的输出是 1D 的，其空间中没有方向可以达成一致。因此，Conv111 和 PrimaryCapsules 之间不使用路由。所有路由 logits（b_ij）初始化为零。因此，初始时胶囊输出（u_i）以等概率（c_ij）发送给所有父胶囊（v_0...v_9）。我们的实现基于 TensorFlow（Abadi 等人，2016），并使用 Adam 优化器（Kingma 和 Ba，2014）及其 TensorFlow 默认参数（包括指数衰减学习率）来最小化公式 4 中边际损失的总和。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Decoder structure to reconstruct a digit from the DigitCaps layer representation. The euclidean distance between the image and the output of the Sigmoid layer is minimized during training. We use the true label as reconstruction target during training.
items.capZh: 图2：从DigitCaps层表示重建数字的解码器结构。训练过程中最小化图像与Sigmoid层输出之间的欧氏距离。训练时我们使用真实标签作为重建目标。

items.en: Training is performed on 28×28282828\times 28 MNIST (LeCun et al. (1998)) images that have been shifted by up to 222 pixels in each direction with zero padding. No other data augmentation/deformation is used. The dataset has 606060K and 101010K images for training and testing respectively.
items.zh: 训练在28×28的MNIST（LeCun等人，1998）图像上进行，这些图像在每方向最多平移2个像素，并用零填充。未使用其他数据增强/变形。数据集分别有60K和10K张图像用于训练和测试。

items.en: We test using a single model without any model averaging. Wan et al. (2013) achieves 0.210.210.21% test error with ensembling and augmenting the data with rotation and scaling. They achieve 0.390.390.39% without them. We get a low test error (0.250.25\bm{0.25}%) on a 333 layer network previously only achieved by deeper networks. Tab. 1 reports the test error rate on MNIST for different CapsNet setups and shows the importance of routing and reconstruction regularizer. Adding the reconstruction regularizer boosts the routing performance by enforcing the pose encoding in the capsule vector.
items.zh: 我们使用单个模型进行测试，未进行任何模型平均。Wan等人（2013）通过集成和旋转缩放数据增强实现了0.21%的测试错误率，无增强时为0.39%。我们在一个3层网络上获得了低测试错误率（0.25%），此前只有更深网络才能达到。表1报告了不同CapsNet设置下MNIST的测试错误率，显示了路由和重构正则化的重要性。添加重构正则化通过强制胶囊向量中的位姿编码提升了路由性能。

items.en: The baseline is a standard CNN with three convolutional layers of 256,256,128256256128256,256,128 channels. Each has 5x5 kernels and stride of 1. The last convolutional layers are followed by two fully connected layers of size 328,192328192328,192. The last fully connected layer is connected with dropout to a 101010 class softmax layer with cross entropy loss. The baseline is also trained on 2-pixel shifted MNIST with Adam optimizer. The baseline is designed to achieve the best performance on MNIST while keeping the computation cost as close as to CapsNet. In terms of number of parameters the baseline has 35.4M while CapsNet has 8.2M parameters and 6.8M parameters without the reconstruction subnetwork.
items.zh: 基线是一个标准CNN，包含三个卷积层，通道数分别为256、256、128，每个卷积层使用5x5核，步长为1。最后一个卷积层后接两个全连接层，大小分别为328和192。最后一个全连接层通过dropout连接到10类softmax层，使用交叉熵损失。基线也在2像素平移的MNIST上使用Adam优化器训练。基线旨在实现MNIST上的最佳性能，同时保持计算成本尽可能接近CapsNet。在参数数量方面，基线有35.4M参数，而CapsNet有8.2M参数，无重构子网络时为6.8M参数。

full.sec: 5.1 What the individual dimensions of a capsule represent

items.en: Since we are passing the encoding of only one digit and zeroing out other digits, the dimensions of a digit capsule should learn to span the space of variations in the way digits of that class are instantiated. These variations include stroke thickness, skew and width. They also include digit-specific variations such as the length of the tail of a 2. We can see what the individual dimensions represent by making use of the decoder network. After computing the activity vector for the correct digit capsule, we can feed a perturbed version of this activity vector to the decoder network and see how the perturbation affects the reconstruction. Examples of these perturbations are shown in Fig. 4. We found that one dimension (out of 161616) of the capsule almost always represents the width of the digit. While some dimensions represent combinations of global variations, there are other dimensions that represent variation in a localized part of the digit. For example, different dimensions are used for the length of the ascender of a 6 and the size of the loop.
items.zh: 由于我们只传递一个数字的编码并将其他数字的编码置零，数字胶囊的各个维度应学会张成该类数字实例化方式的变化空间。这些变化包括笔画粗细、倾斜度和宽度。它们还包括数字特有的变化，例如数字2尾部长度。我们可以通过利用解码器网络来观察各个维度代表什么。在计算出正确数字胶囊的活动向量后，我们可以将该活动向量的扰动版本馈送到解码器网络，并观察扰动如何影响重构。这些扰动的示例见图4。我们发现，胶囊的16个维度中几乎总有一个维度代表数字的宽度。虽然有些维度代表全局变化的组合，但还有其他维度代表数字局部区域的变化。例如，数字6的竖线长度和环的大小由不同的维度表示。

items.en: Experiments show that each DigitCaps capsule learns a more robust representation for each class than a traditional convolutional network. Because there is natural variance in skew, rotation, style, etc in hand written digits, the trained CapsNet is moderately robust to small affine transformations of the training data.
items.zh: 实验表明，每个DigitCaps胶囊比传统卷积网络为每个类别学习到了更鲁棒的表示。由于手写数字在倾斜、旋转、风格等方面存在自然变化，训练后的CapsNet对训练数据的小型仿射变换具有中等鲁棒性。

items.en: To test the robustness of CapsNet to affine transformations, we trained a CapsNet and a traditional convolutional network (with MaxPooling and DropOut) on a padded and translated MNIST training set, in which each example is an MNIST digit placed randomly on a black background of 40×40404040\times 40 pixels. We then tested this network on the affNIST444Available at http://www.cs.toronto.edu/~tijmen/affNIST/. data set, in which each example is an MNIST digit with a random small affine transformation. Our models were never trained with affine transformations other than translation and any natural transformation seen in the standard MNIST. An under-trained CapsNet with early stopping which achieved 99.23% accuracy on the expanded MNIST test set achieved 79% accuracy on the affnist test set. A traditional convolutional model with a similar number of parameters which achieved similar accuracy (99.22%) on the expanded mnist test set only achieved 66% on the affnist test set.
items.zh: 为了测试CapsNet对仿射变换的鲁棒性，我们在填充和平移后的MNIST训练集上训练了CapsNet和传统卷积网络（使用最大池化和DropOut），其中每个样本是一个MNIST数字，随机放置在40×40像素的黑色背景上。然后我们在affNIST数据集上测试该网络，该数据集中每个样本是经过随机小型仿射变换的MNIST数字。我们的模型从未使用除平移和标准MNIST中自然变换之外的仿射变换进行训练。一个采用早停法、在扩展MNIST测试集上达到99.23%准确率的欠训练CapsNet，在affNIST测试集上达到了79%的准确率。一个参数数量相似、在扩展MNIST测试集上达到类似准确率（99.22%）的传统卷积模型，在affNIST测试集上仅达到66%。

items.en: Dynamic routing can be viewed as a parallel attention mechanism that allows each capsule at one level to attend to some active capsules at the level below and to ignore others. This should allow the model to recognize multiple objects in the image even if objects overlap. Hinton et al. propose the task of segmenting and recognizing highly overlapping digits (Hinton et al. (2000) and others have tested their networks in a similar domain (Goodfellow et al. (2013), Ba et al. (2014), Greff et al. (2016)). The routing-by-agreement should make it possible to use a prior about the shape of objects to help segmentation and it should obviate the need to make higher-level segmentation decisions in the domain of pixels.
items.zh: 动态路由可以看作是一种并行注意力机制，它允许某一层的每个胶囊关注下一层的一些活跃胶囊而忽略其他胶囊。这应该使模型能够识别图像中的多个物体，即使这些物体相互重叠。Hinton等人提出了分割和识别高度重叠的数字的任务（Hinton等人（2000）以及其他人在类似领域测试了他们的网络（Goodfellow等人（2013），Ba等人（2014），Greff等人（2016））。通过协议路由应该使得利用物体形状的先验知识来帮助分割成为可能，并且应该避免在像素层面做出更高层次的分割决策。

items.en: We generate the MultiMNIST training and test dataset by overlaying a digit on top of another digit from the same set (training or test) but different class. Each digit is shifted up to 444 pixels in each direction resulting in a 36×36363636\times 36 image. Considering a digit in a 28×28282828\times 28 image is bounded in a 20×20202020\times 20 box, two digits bounding boxes on average have 808080% overlap. For each digit in the MNIST dataset we generate 111K MultiMNIST examples. So the training set size is 606060M and the test set size is 101010M.
items.zh: 我们通过将来自同一集合（训练集或测试集）但不同类别的一个数字叠加在另一个数字之上，生成 MultiMNIST 训练和测试数据集。每个数字在每个方向上最多移动 4 个像素，生成 36×36 的图像。考虑到 28×28 图像中的数字被限制在 20×20 的框内，两个数字的边界框平均有 80% 的重叠。对于 MNIST 数据集中的每个数字，我们生成 1K 个 MultiMNIST 示例。因此，训练集大小为 60M，测试集大小为 10M。

items.en: Our 333 layer CapsNet model trained from scratch on MultiMNIST training data achieves higher test classification accuracy than our baseline convolutional model. We are achieving the same classification error rate of 5.05.05.0% on highly overlapping digit pairs as the sequential attention model of Ba et al. (2014) achieves on a much easier task that has far less overlap (808080% overlap of the boxes around the two digits in our case vs <4absent4<4% for Ba et al. (2014)). On test images, which are composed of pairs of images from the test set, we treat the two most active digit capsules as the classification produced by the capsules network. During reconstruction we pick one digit at a time and use the activity vector of the chosen digit capsule to reconstruct the image of the chosen digit (we know this image because we used it to generate the composite image). The only difference with our MNIST model is that we increased the period of the decay step for the learning rate to be 10×10\times larger because the training dataset is larger.
items.zh: 我们的 333 层 CapsNet 模型在 MultiMNIST 训练数据上从头训练，达到了比基线卷积模型更高的测试分类准确率。我们在高度重叠的数字对上实现了 5.05.05.0% 的分类错误率，与 Ba 等人 (2014) 的序列注意力模型在一个难度更低、重叠程度小得多的任务上（我们的两个数字框重叠率为 808080%，而 Ba 等人 (2014) 的小于 4%4\%4%）所达到的错误率相同。在测试图像上（由测试集中的图像对组成），我们将两个最活跃的数字胶囊视为胶囊网络产生的分类结果。在重建过程中，我们每次选取一个数字，并使用所选数字胶囊的活动向量来重建该数字的图像（我们知道这个图像，因为我们用它生成了复合图像）。与我们的 MNIST 模型唯一不同的是，我们将学习率的衰减步长周期增加了 10×10\times 倍，因为训练数据集更大。

items.en: The reconstructions illustrated in Fig. 5 show that CapsNet is able to segment the image into the two original digits. Since this segmentation is not at pixel level we observe that the model is able to deal correctly with the overlaps (a pixel is on in both digits) while accounting for all the pixels. The position and the style of each digit is encoded in DigitCaps. The decoder has learned to reconstruct a digit given the encoding. The fact that it is able to reconstruct digits regardless of the overlap shows that each digit capsule can pick up the style and position from the votes it is receiving from PrimaryCapsules layer.
items.zh: 图 5 所示的重建结果表明，CapsNet 能够将图像分割成两个原始数字。由于这种分割并非像素级别，我们观察到模型能够正确处理重叠（一个像素在两个数字中都存在），同时考虑所有像素。每个数字的位置和风格都编码在 DigitCaps 中。解码器学会了根据编码重建数字。它能够无视重叠重建数字的事实表明，每个数字胶囊可以从 PrimaryCapsules 层接收的投票中提取风格和位置信息。

items.en: Tab. 1 emphasizes the importance of capsules with routing on this task. As a baseline for the classification of CapsNet accuracy we trained a convolution network with two convolution layers and two fully connected layers on top of them. The first layer has 512512512 convolution kernels of size 9×9999\times 9 and stride 111. The second layer has 256256256 kernels of size 5×5555\times 5 and stride 111. After each convolution layer the model has a pooling layer of size 2×2222\times 2 and stride 222. The third layer is a 102410241024D fully connected layer. All three layers have ReLU non-linearities. The final layer of 101010 units is fully connected. We use the TensorFlow default Adam optimizer (Kingma and Ba (2014)) to train a sigmoid cross entropy loss on the output of final layer. This model has 24.5624.5624.56M parameters which is 222 times more parameters than CapsNet with 11.3611.3611.36M parameters. We started with a smaller CNN (323232 and 646464 convolutional kernels of 5×5555\times 5 and stride of 111 and a 512512512D fully connected layer) and incrementally increased the width of the network until we reached the best test accuracy on a 101010K subset of the MultiMNIST data. We also searched for the right decay step on the 101010K validation set.
items.zh: 表 1 强调了在此任务上使用路由的胶囊的重要性。作为 CapsNet 准确率的基线，我们训练了一个卷积网络，该网络包含两个卷积层和两个全连接层。第一层有 512512512 个大小为 9×9999\times 9、步长为 111 的卷积核。第二层有 256256256 个大小为 5×5555\times 5、步长为 111 的卷积核。每个卷积层后都有一个大小为 2×2222\times 2、步长为 222 的池化层。第三层是 102410241024 维的全连接层。所有三层都使用 ReLU 非线性激活函数。最后一层是 101010 个单元的全连接层。我们使用 TensorFlow 默认的 Adam 优化器 (Kingma and Ba (2014)) 在最后一层的输出上训练 sigmoid 交叉熵损失。该模型有 24.5624.5624.56M 个参数，是 CapsNet（11.3611.3611.36M 参数）参数量的 222 倍。我们从较小的 CNN（323232 和 646464 个大小为 5×5555\times 5、步长为 111 的卷积核，以及 512512512 维全连接层）开始，逐步增加网络宽度，直到在 MultiMNIST 数据的 101010K 子集上达到最佳测试准确率。我们还在 101010K 验证集上搜索了正确的衰减步长。

items.en: We decode the two most active DigitCaps capsules one at a time and get two images. Then by assigning any pixel with non-zero intensity to each digit we get the segmentation results for each digit.
items.zh: 我们每次解码两个最活跃的 DigitCaps 胶囊中的一个，得到两幅图像。然后，将任何非零强度的像素分配给每个数字，从而得到每个数字的分割结果。

items.en: We tested our capsule model on CIFAR10 and achieved 10.6% error with an ensemble of 7 models each of which is trained with 333 routing iterations on 24×24242424\times 24 patches of the image. Each model has the same architecture as the simple model we used for MNIST except that there are three color channels and we used 646464 different types of primary capsule. We also found that it helped to introduce a "none-of-the-above" category for the routing softmaxes, since we do not expect the final layer of ten capsules to explain everything in the image. 10.6% test error is about what standard convolutional nets achieved when they were first applied to CIFAR10 (Zeiler and Fergus (2013)).
items.zh: 我们在CIFAR10上测试了我们的胶囊模型，使用7个模型的集成实现了10.6%的错误率，每个模型在图像的24×24块上训练了333次路由迭代。每个模型与我们在MNIST上使用的简单模型架构相同，只是有三个颜色通道，并且我们使用了64种不同的主胶囊。我们还发现，为路由softmax引入一个“以上皆非”类别是有帮助的，因为我们不希望最后一层的十个胶囊解释图像中的所有内容。10.6%的测试错误率大约相当于标准卷积网络首次应用于CIFAR10时的水平（Zeiler和Fergus (2013)）。

items.en: One drawback of Capsules which it shares with generative models is that it likes to account for everything in the image so it does better when it can model the clutter than when it just uses an additional “orphan” category in the dynamic routing. In CIFAR-10, the backgrounds are much too varied to model in a reasonable sized net which helps to account for the poorer performance.
items.zh: 胶囊的一个缺点（与生成模型共享）是它倾向于解释图像中的所有内容，因此当它能够对杂乱背景建模时，比仅仅在动态路由中使用额外的“孤儿”类别表现更好。在CIFAR-10中，背景变化太大，无法在合理大小的网络中建模，这导致了较差的性能。

items.en: We also tested the exact same architecture as we used for MNIST on smallNORB (LeCun et al. (2004)) and achieved 2.7%percent2.72.7\% test error rate, which is on-par with the state-of-the-art (Cireşan et al. (2011)). The smallNORB dataset consists of 96x96 stereo grey-scale images. We resized the images to 48x48 and during training processed random 32x32 crops of them. We passed the central 32x32 patch during test.
items.zh: 我们还在smallNORB（LeCun等人 (2004)）上测试了与MNIST完全相同的架构，实现了2.7%的测试错误率，与最先进水平相当（Cireşan等人 (2011)）。smallNORB数据集包含96x96的立体灰度图像。我们将图像调整为48x48，并在训练过程中随机裁剪32x32的块进行处理。测试时使用中心32x32的块。

items.en: We also trained a smaller network on the small training set of SVHN (Netzer et al. (2011)) with only 73257 images. We reduced the number of first convolutional layer channels to 64, the primary capsule layer to 16 6​D6𝐷6D-capsules with 8​D8𝐷8D final capsule layer at the end and achieved 4.3%percent4.34.3\% on the test set.
items.zh: 我们还在SVHN（Netzer等人 (2011)）的小训练集上训练了一个较小的网络，仅使用73257张图像。我们将第一个卷积层的通道数减少到64，主胶囊层减少到16个6D胶囊，最终胶囊层为8D，在测试集上实现了4.3%的错误率。

items.en: For thirty years, the state-of-the-art in speech recognition used hidden Markov models with Gaussian mixtures as output distributions. These models were easy to learn on small computers, but they had a representational limitation that was ultimately fatal: The one-of-n representations they use are exponentially inefficient compared with, say, a recurrent neural network that uses distributed representations. To double the amount of information that an HMM can remember about the string it has generated so far, we need to square the number of hidden nodes. For a recurrent net we only need to double the number of hidden neurons.
items.zh: 三十年来，语音识别的最先进技术一直使用以高斯混合模型作为输出分布的隐马尔可夫模型。这些模型易于在小型计算机上学习，但它们存在一个最终致命的表示局限性：它们使用的独热表示与使用分布式表示的循环神经网络相比，效率呈指数级低下。要使HMM能够记住其已生成字符串的信息量翻倍，我们需要将隐藏节点数平方。而对于循环网络，我们只需将隐藏神经元数量翻倍。

items.en: Now that convolutional neural networks have become the dominant approach to object recognition, it makes sense to ask whether there are any exponential inefficiencies that may lead to their demise. A good candidate is the difficulty that convolutional nets have in generalizing to novel viewpoints. The ability to deal with translation is built in, but for the other dimensions of an affine transformation we have to chose between replicating feature detectors on a grid that grows exponentially with the number of dimensions, or increasing the size of the labelled training set in a similarly exponential way. Capsules (Hinton et al. (2011)) avoid these exponential inefficiencies by converting pixel intensities into vectors of instantiation parameters of recognized fragments and then applying transformation matrices to the fragments to predict the instantiation parameters of larger fragments. Transformation matrices that learn to encode the intrinsic spatial relationship between a part and a whole constitute viewpoint invariant knowledge that automatically generalizes to novel viewpoints. Hinton et al. (2011) proposed transforming autoencoders to generate the instantiation parameters of the PrimaryCapsule layer and their system required transformation matrices to be supplied externally. We propose a complete system that also answers "how larger and more complex visual entities can be recognized by using agreements of the poses predicted by active, lower-level capsules".
items.zh: 既然卷积神经网络已成为目标识别的主流方法，那么有必要追问是否存在可能导致其衰落的指数级低效问题。一个很好的候选是卷积网络在泛化到新视角方面的困难。处理平移的能力是内置的，但对于仿射变换的其他维度，我们必须在以下两者间做出选择：要么在一个随维度数量呈指数增长的网格上复制特征检测器，要么以类似指数方式增大标注训练集的规模。胶囊（Hinton等人，2011）通过将像素强度转换为已识别片段的实例化参数向量，然后对片段应用变换矩阵以预测更大片段的实例化参数，从而避免了这些指数级低效问题。学习编码部分与整体之间内在空间关系的变换矩阵构成了视角不变的知识，能够自动泛化到新视角。Hinton等人（2011）提出了变换自编码器来生成PrimaryCapsule层的实例化参数，但其系统需要外部提供变换矩阵。我们提出了一个完整的系统，也回答了“如何通过利用活跃的低层胶囊预测的姿态的一致性来识别更大更复杂的视觉实体”。

items.en: Capsules make a very strong representational assumption: At each location in the image, there is at most one instance of the type of entity that a capsule represents. This assumption, which was motivated by the perceptual phenomenon called "crowding" (Pelli et al. (2004)), eliminates the binding problem (Hinton (1981a)) and allows a capsule to use a distributed representation (its activity vector) to encode the instantiation parameters of the entity of that type at a given location. This distributed representation is exponentially more efficient than encoding the instantiation parameters by activating a point on a high-dimensional grid and with the right distributed representation, capsules can then take full advantage of the fact that spatial relationships can be modelled by matrix multiplies.
items.zh: 胶囊做出了一个非常强的表示假设：在图像中的每个位置，最多只有一个胶囊所表示的实体类型的实例。这一假设受到称为“拥挤”的知觉现象（Pelli等人，2004）的启发，消除了绑定问题（Hinton，1981a），并允许胶囊使用分布式表示（其活动向量）来编码给定位置该类型实体的实例化参数。这种分布式表示比通过激活高维网格上的一个点来编码实例化参数要高效得多，并且有了正确的分布式表示，胶囊可以充分利用空间关系可以通过矩阵乘法建模这一事实。

items.en: Capsules use neural activities that vary as viewpoint varies rather than trying to eliminate viewpoint variation from the activities. This gives them an advantage over "normalization" methods like spatial transformer networks (Jaderberg et al. (2015)): They can deal with multiple different affine transformations of different objects or object parts at the same time.
items.zh: 胶囊使用的神经活动随视角变化而变化，而不是试图从活动中消除视角变化。这使它们相对于空间变换网络（Jaderberg等人，2015）等“归一化”方法具有优势：它们可以同时处理不同对象或对象部分的多个不同仿射变换。

items.en: Capsules are also very good for dealing with segmentation, which is another of the toughest problems in vision, because the vector of instantiation parameters allows them to use routing-by-agreement, as we have demonstrated in this paper. The importance of dynamic routing procedure is also backed by biologically plausible models of invarient pattern recognition in the visual cortex. Hinton (1981b) proposes dynamic connections and canonical object based frames of reference to generate shape descriptions that can be used for object recognition. Olshausen et al. (1993) improves upon Hinton (1981b) dynamic connections and presents a biologically plausible, position and scale invariant model of object representations.
items.zh: 胶囊也非常适合处理分割问题，这是视觉中最棘手的问题之一，因为实例化参数向量允许它们使用路由协议，正如我们在本文中所展示的。动态路由过程的重要性也得到了视觉皮层中不变模式识别的生物学合理模型的支持。Hinton（1981b）提出了动态连接和基于规范对象的参考框架来生成可用于目标识别的形状描述。Olshausen等人（1993）改进了Hinton（1981b）的动态连接，并提出了一种生物学合理的、位置和尺度不变的对象表示模型。

items.en: Research on capsules is now at a similar stage to research on recurrent neural networks for speech recognition at the beginning of this century. There are fundamental representational reasons for believing that it is a better approach but it probably requires a lot more small insights before it can out-perform a highly developed technology. The fact that a simple capsules system already gives unparalleled performance at segmenting overlapping digits is an early indication that capsules are a direction worth exploring.
items.zh: 胶囊研究目前处于与本世纪初用于语音识别的循环神经网络研究相似的阶段。有根本性的表示理由相信它是一种更好的方法，但它可能需要更多的小洞察才能超越高度发达的技术。一个简单的胶囊系统已经在分割重叠数字方面提供了无与伦比的性能，这一事实早期表明胶囊是一个值得探索的方向。

items.en: Acknowledgement. Of the many who provided us with constructive comments, we are specially grateful to Robert Gens, Eric Langlois, Vincent Vanhoucke, Chris Williams, and the reviewers for their fruitful comments and corrections.
items.zh: 致谢。在众多提供建设性意见的人中，我们特别感谢Robert Gens、Eric Langlois、Vincent Vanhoucke、Chris Williams以及审稿人，感谢他们富有成果的评论和更正。
